title: Square provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Square Payments + Cards + Disputes + Cash App Pay integration. All credentials encrypted at rest.

access_token.description: Square OAuth access token. Format: EAAAE... (production) or EAAAF... (sandbox). Encrypted at rest.

application_id.description: Square application ID. Format: sq0idp-... (production) or sq0idb-... (sandbox). Sent to the customer's client-side SDK.

location_id.description: Square location identifier. All payments are location-scoped in Square.

webhook_signature_key.description: Square webhook signature key. Used to verify Square-Signature header on inbound webhooks.

environment.description: Square environment. production = connect.squareup.com; sandbox = connect.squareupsandbox.com.

cash_app_pay_enabled.description: Whether to enable Cash App Pay as a payment method. US-only. Requires additional Square + Cash App agreement.

gift_cards_enabled.description: Whether to enable Square Gift Cards. When true, gift card payments show as method_type='wallet' with brand='square_gift_card'.
